name: Arabian Stew
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Chicken, cooked and cut up
12 ounces Fresh or 8 ounces -canned Mushrooms, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except for the cheese) in a crock pot in the order listed.
2. Cover and cook on medium for 8-10 hours.
3. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese.
4. Makes 20 cups.
